story: The aquarium's water parameters were tested at seven AM. The pH was measured at 8.2, ammonia at zero, nitrite at zero, and nitrate at ten parts per million. A partial water change of twenty percent was performed. The sand substrate was vacuumed and the filter media was rinsed with tank water. The lighting timer was set to an eight-hour cycle. The fish were fed a measured amount of flake food. The temperature was maintained at 78 degrees Fahrenheit. The log was updated with the day's readings.
